channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped vehicle, 30th April
item.description:
Car is in poor condition. Only registration number plate at the front. Broken rear window.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beck Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped vehicle, 30th April
item.description:
MOT has run out. Door was open on the vehicle yesterday morning. It looks dumped.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beck Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please remove this bin from the pavement, 30th April
item.description:
This bin has been full for few weeks now and unfortunately waste collection doesn't empty it It's very disturbing to have waste bin full of rubbish on the pavement It is hazardous to the public Thank you in advance
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelly Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post hit by car, 30th April
item.description:
Police ref: cad 9381/29apr26 veh has hit post, is leaning, needs to be checked for safety.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crab Hill, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop timetable casing still broken with no timetable displayed, 30th April
item.description:
For around a year now, the casing has been damaged with no timetable showing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crown Dale, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Live deers, 30th April
item.description:
On the M11 from braintree towards london there is live deer walking into the motorway past 12am not sure where it has gone but saw a few. this is a road hazard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M11, Theydon Garnon, Epping Forest
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 'Paan' (red rust) stained pavement | Spa Road | Tree near Amisha Court entrance, 30th April
item.description:
Please help clear 'Paan-spitting' (red rust) stained pavement near the tree of Amisha Court, Entrance 3 on Spa Road, SE1 3GH. Pin location accurate. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 161, Grange Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spring Seeds Street Cleaning | Grange Road and Spa Road, Bermondsey (ref: 9320285), 30th April
item.description:
Previous ref: 9320285 was not actioned properly. Please help clear the entire street length of Grange Road, SE1 3GH and Spa Road, Bermondsey, as both sides of the pavement for the entire streets are covered with seasonal (spring) seeds and new leaves like thick blanket of dust everywhere which is flaring up allergies. Pin location accurate. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Spa Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Glass | Arts Lane | Near Kagyu Samye Dzong London Tibetan Buddhist Meditation Centre and Sainsbury's ATM, 30th April
item.description:
Please help clear broken glass on Arts Lane near near 'Kagyu Samye Dzong London Tibetan Buddhist Meditation Centre' and Sainsbury's ATM, SE16 3SA. Pin location accurate. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Spa Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog Waste | Spa Road | Tree near nearby, 29th April
item.description:
Please help clear dog waste under the tree near Amisha Court, Entrance 3 on Spa Road, SE1 3GH. Pin location accurate. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 161, Grange Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Forest hire bikes blocking the pavement and road dangerous, 29th April
item.description:
Abandoned Forest hire bikes blocking the pavement and road dangerous as shown in picture. Might hurt somebody. Opposite Hippodrome casino at Little Newport Street. Found and detached battery for a Bike/Scooter next to the Parked Bikes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Little Newport Street, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Broken Mirror Dumped by Pavement, 29th April
item.description:
An unwanted broken mirror has been left dumped by the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ann Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rusty Garden Furniture and Broken Toy Dumped by Turfed Space, 29th April
item.description:
Several items of rusty garden furniture and a broken toy have been left dumped by the turfed space. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Villas Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of Rusty Garden Furniture Dumped on Path, 29th April
item.description:
A pile of rusty garden furniture has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Villas Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ground services cover is broken, 29th April
item.description:
The cover for ground services on the pavement is broken and needs to be fixed before a person falls through the cover causing injury or death.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cornwall Road, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead cat, 29th April
item.description:
Dead cat on grass bank (opposite chicken shop)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Leith Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All white lines are slightly faded on site., 29th April
item.description:
All white lines are slightly faded on site.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 191, Southwark Park Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No 39 nelson road n9 rubbish all over Wellington ave and in the car park, 29th April
item.description:
Rubbish from no 39 Nelson Road n9 0rh is all over Wellington ave and also in the private car park. Fly tipping taken to the extreme. Not acceptable. Council needs to take appropriate action as im not paying my council tax for no reason

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nelson Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Death tree on the south side of the road, 29th April
item.description:
This tree has been death for some time now. Can I kindly ask that the council replaces it with a new tree? Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dynevor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal square mesh panel about 1 Sq.m from the Tramlink / 3rd rail railway line swinging loose and dangerously across the narrow public footway in Rectory Rd, Beckenham., 29th April
item.description:
Metal square mesh panel about 1 Sq.m from the Tramlink / 3rd rail railway line swinging loose and dangerously across the narrow public footway in Rectory Rd, Beckenham. The absence of the metal panel allows dangerous access to the railway for children, adults and pets. Please instruct the relevant rail authority to repair the metal urgently.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
